name: Sweet'n' Spicy Sausage Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pork, bread crumbs, egg, onion, parsley, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape into 16 meatballs, each about 1-1/4 inches in diameter.
3. Place the meatballs in an ungreased shallow baking pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
5. While the meatballs are baking, cut the frozen croissants in half lengthwise and arrange them on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Heat the croissant halves in the preheated oven for 9-11 minutes, or until lightly golden.
7. When the meatballs are done baking, spoon about 2 tablespoons of the apricot preserves and barbecue sauce mixture over each meatball.
8. Place a croissant top on each serving.
9. Cut each croissant into fourths.
10. Serve with the remaining sauce.
